title: Personal & Corporate Banking | MSME & Agri banking - IDBI Bank
content:
### Solution to Financial Needs of Traders, Wholesalers and Retailers - IDBI Bank Sahaj Vyapar Business Solutions 
Traders act as a vital link between the manufacturers of goods / commodities and the consumers. The product aims to provide hassle free finance to traders and to meet their business and financial needs at competitive interest rates. Any individual or a firm (partnership or proprietorship) engaged primarily in buying and selling of goods is eligible for this scheme thus offering solution to all the financial needs of the wholesalers / traders / retailers under the Product. 
All business entities (engaged in Trading Activity (both retail and wholesale).
Fund Based : Cash credit Overdraft/Term Loan/Bill Discounting Non Fund Based: LC/BG 


Linked to banks Repo Linked Lending Rate (RLLR) and Rating 
Hypothecation of stocks, receivables, assets financed by bank. Immovable Residential /Commercial or Industrial property 
Cash Credit : 25% on stock and Book debts Overdraft : NIL Term loan : 25 %

metadata.description: IDBI Bank offers a wide range of products from savings and current bank account to loans for retail and msme customers  or agri loans to farmers. Apply Now.
metadata.keywords: Internet Banking, savings account, Debit Card, personal loans, home loans, loans, fixed deposits
